title: Milton Town Council Approves 2025 Budget
summary: Council voted 6-3 to approve $387M operating budget with 4.2% tax increase. Includes new community center funding.

title: Bill 212: Highway 413 Advances to Third Reading
summary: Reducing Gridlock Act passes committee stage. Highway through north Milton moves closer to reality.

title: MP van Koeverden Met with Dairy Lobby
summary: Milton MP Adam van Koeverden held meeting with Dairy Farmers of Canada on January 15 to discuss supply management.

title: Derry Heights Rezoning Public Meeting Scheduled
summary: Ward 4 statutory public meeting on OPA-31 rezoning set for April 15. Comment deadline April 30.

title: Online Harms Act (C-63) in Committee Review
summary: Parliamentary committee hearing testimony on child safety provisions and free speech concerns.

title: Highway 413 Corridor Protection Order Issued
summary: Province issues corridor protection affecting 14 Milton properties in north end. Property owners notified.

title: Milton Council Meeting Summary - March 3
summary: Council approved Tremaine subdivision, discussed 2025 budget priorities, and received update on downtown heritage district.

title: Bill 23 Impact: Tremaine Subdivision Approved
summary: 420-unit development greenlit under streamlined Bill 23 process. Reduced parkland contribution noted.

title: Petition: Protect Milton Farmland
summary: Community petition calling for agricultural land protection reaches 5,432 signatures. Delivery to Council March 17.

title: Online News Act (C-18) Implementation Update
summary: CRTC announces first compensation agreements between news outlets and tech platforms under Bill C-18.

title: Planning Committee Considers Heritage District
summary: Committee reviews proposal to designate 12 Main Street buildings as cultural heritage properties.

title: MPP Gill Comments on Bill 23 Housing Impact
summary: Milton MPP Parm Gill defends More Homes Built Faster Act, cites 3,200 units approved in Milton since passage.

title: New Development Notice: Tremaine Road
summary: Construction begins Q3 2025 on 420-unit subdivision. Traffic management plan submitted to Town.

title: Bill C-63: Online Harms Act Debate Continues
summary: MPs debate child protection measures vs. free expression concerns. Committee amendments expected.

title: Downtown Heritage District Proposed
summary: Town proposes heritage designation for 12 Main Street buildings. Public information session February 28.
